title: Cobblemon Apex
description: Enjoy Cobblemon at its finest with our curated selection of over 90 mods, specifically chosen for optimal performance and a streamlined gameplay experience.
body:
![Server Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60d6b8b2297cb1475e200f80933ae97dfa4dae15.png)
### **Official Apex Cobblemon Modpack** ![Discord Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1978d95df43c9cb2f01af72f1e8c9f43a00ed2de.png) [**Discord**](https://discord.gg/apexcobblemon)    ![Heart Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/653693cfbfef44fc41cbf349be719da9f33f2f03.png) [**Install Guide**](https://apexcobblemon.com/modpack)    ![Help](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0862cc275b6c3c7b907bc9264945c5b5b08663df.png) [**Wiki**](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com)

Apex Cobblemon is a lightweight Fabric Modpack designed specifically for optimal performance and a streamlined gameplay experience on our official server: **play.apexcobblemon.com**
## Battling Features ![Raids](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8565e6bdd8e822b41ce9fb03a785f77e0e90b43a.png) **[Raids](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/battling/raids)** _Attempt to defeat a series of minion waves to defeat + catch the final boss_
![WorldBosses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ffb0412bb18fb8d2856f23144fd5a24ab182080.png) **[World Bosses](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/battling/world-bosses)** _Server-wide boss battle where those who contribute the most damage win_
![Battle Tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89df9017168f9db70e942ca969dce37193260339.png) **[Battle Tower](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/battling/battle-tower)** _Challenge a dynamically generated NPC opponent with various formats_
![Apex Bosses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ce38bceab59bb5fe578e53b03408552abaf3db0.png) **[Apex Bosses](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/pokemon/apex-bosses)** _Rare boss spawns which must be weakened before battle_
![Player Gyms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b9281822f7dab6f894e5e84be9f05ef90d456fe.png) **[Player Gyms](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/battling/player-gyms)** _Now accepting [applications](https://www.apexcobblemon.com/form/2/select)!_
![PokéDrops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1465c904e289c189a6969ee14c10173e91a3bafe.png) **[Custom Pokémon Drops](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/pokemon/drops)** _Defeat Pokémon and sell their loot_
## General Features ![exotic_bait](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95771b417332adaa42e7058eafc1c7418a8d6fb1_0.webp) **[Custom Fishing](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/fishing)** _Features 120 unique Trophy Fish, a wide variety of catchable rewards, and deep progression through 24 perk upgrades, supplies, and more_
![cosmetic_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c52f2ee629290ef1dddd1ca31d3ed4e4c7155f0f.png) **[Unlockable Cosmetics](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/player/cosmetics)** _Over 1,700 Hats, Body Items, Held Items, Furniture, Chat Pins, Emojis, Emotes, Join/Quit messages, & more!_
![skill icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e35c43e3b165f73005db49272613c4705301a4ff.png) **[Skills](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/player/skills)** _Train 4 different skills to unlock & upgrade over 15 unique abilities_
![mew_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00ad43956a3174733e4f461d90a430ad9e8d9bbd.png) **[Legendary Spawns](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/pokemon/legendary-spawns)** _Up to 5 legends can spawn at a time!_
![breeding_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41296a98467aed55a292d18f40bb36a5939dee60.png) **[Breeding](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/pokemon/breeding)** _Breed Pokémon with matching egg groups_
![pokedex_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7c7b5ba0d43ede93f1a0e91e2f8500c5be09009.png) **[PokéDex Rewards](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/pokemon/pokedex)** _Normal, Shiny, Legend, Exotic, and Living_
![catch_combo_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35677e73685e709800927ca7213d11fffebba864.png) **[Catch Combos](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/pokemon/catch-combos)** _Increase your Shiny/HA spawn chances by increasing your Catch Combo_
![outbreak_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51d0f5946794f0e80253d2a069392fe735d8e7ad.png) **[Outbreaks](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/pokemon/outbreaks)** _Dozens of a single species are rapidly spawned_
![rustle_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e6361c759124bdfc947cf00de8e55242a8934f9.png) **[Rustles](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/pokemon/rustles)** _Rare spawns with increased rarity/shiny/ha chances_
![pokehunt_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e4e2079bb6fca578faeb15eaf81b04439eefb0e.png) **[PokéHunts](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/pokemon/pokehunts)** _Complete hunts for specific Pokémon by Catching or Breeding_
![bingo_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71140bc4f78894d9b69d2e82c1fbd1a60df8ec36.png) **[Bingo](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/player/bingo)** _Catch Pokémon on your Bingo card to earn rewards_
![crown_rank_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94f748fa522d6667e5ca3c073213dc4f20c37c0e.png) **[Progression Ranks](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/player/badges)** _Unlock 'Crown Ranks' for completing 30 different Badge tasks_
![event_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/911de1de8bf7fe407c718c98bb23342099355bf3.png) **Events & Tournaments** _Compete in tournaments, or queue up for Parkour/Elytra/Sumo Wrestling_
![warp_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/badcd50ff847c304c63dfd59db48d93db98a9146.png) **[Player Warps](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/player/player-warps) & [ChestShops](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/player/chestshops)** _Set up a Player Warp & Shop to sell your goods_
![shoulder_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3f5a73d54f1dc85d481b44db3809c28d8afd058.png) **[Shoulder Mounts](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/pokemon/shoulder-mounts)** _Equip shoulder mounts for special boosts_
![pokebuilder_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c91ff416bb4cc3ed7b6e4d7e0c17e90e315a2a0.png) **[PokéBuilder](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/pokemon/pokebuilder)** _Upgrade various attributes on your Pokémon_
![present_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/040fed5f3d1b9e7e34b3f43e6991e89210589bff.png) **[Present Hunt](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/player/presents)** _Search for presents hidden around various warps_
![wiki_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca72e71a4d926d7bf53f1af47e68aa1f0729ae3b.png) **Species Wiki** _View all details of any species in-game_
![guild_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f658a43f2c7010e37475509938b43ece7212197d.png) **[Player Guilds](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/player/guilds)** _Create or join a guild to progress together and unlock perks_
![wondertrade_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34eda997eea13a60ab695d1bea70102101b3b05f.png) **[WonderTrade](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/trading/wondertrade)** _Trade away Pokémon to receive a random Pokémon from another player_
![sts_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdad3f32feb8aa72d50cd7e3e269cbd5c2e5c2cb.png) **[Sell to Server](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/trading/sell-to-server)** _Instantly sell items directly to the server for guaranteed currency_
![trivia_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2b8ed4d5fd6d09f8cf710f23d4aca589557854f.png) **Pokémon Trivia** _Answer Pokémon themed questions to earn rewards and test your knowledge_
![voting_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c382dacc3c3b92586badfded0c0fb9a646550d9.png) **WeatherVote** _Vote to change the world’s weather and influence spawns and gameplay_
![rtp_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/632aca017cd52f8333aa208b11aeaf7f9564abf6.png) **Random Teleport** _Teleport into the Overworld, Nether, or End_
![custom_world_generation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36d69793330c6976ba883f062540514d93419991.png) **Overhauled World Generation** _Explore a completely reworked world with custom terrain and biomes_
![safari_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61da3a455dbb97bebbd3304fdafe49ec0bdb63dd.png) **[Safari](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/pokemon/safari)** _Explore each of the 17 Biomes where rare Pokémon await!_
![gts_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b8065f065376f0f16fe51f4b8b2bdf127e7bc03.png) **[GTS](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/trading/gts)** _Buy and sell Pokémon globally through a player driven marketplace_
![coinflip_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74f289763a0b35d2b96957731ba68aea4ac53daa_0.webp) **[Coin Flip](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/player/coin-flip)** _Risk your money in a high stakes coin flip against other players_
![tm_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c11102c298bff11563326746df2daaad98d1c85.png) **[TM Shop](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com/features/trading/shop#tm-shop)** _Purchase TM's to teach Pokémon new moves_
_... and plenty more Pokémon focused content!_
## Modpack Features ![server_int_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/314c4d1b5640cfa11cefaae44e3b4d81b6e607f1.png) **[Custom Client Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/apex-integration)** _Enhance your experience with our custom client-side utility mod_
![music icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15b5719bad8b0d993a04d6b7537eba577eae2223.png) **[Cobblemon Realms Soundtrack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/cobblemon-realms)** _Play over 50 classic Pokémon songs in-game_
![voice_chat_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e9001f209b4350a880ceade7e5b3420a02258b4.png) **[Proximity Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)** _Optionally chat with nearby players_
![integration_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c64b4a96e6b33d60f95d1e0ea640f2f990e087f.png) **Your Options Shall Be Respected** _Config changes aren’t wiped after modpack updates_
![hardware_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02896689eb259d1f063fa12444e4a98ef2dc26b1.png) **Highly Optimized** _Expect greatly improved performance on lower end hardware_
![qol_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c2e6912533107bb2659083272d880306cb64cf9.png) **Quality of Life Enhancements** _Enjoy a streamlined gameplay experience_

**_Begin your Cobblemon adventure today!_** ![Discord Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1978d95df43c9cb2f01af72f1e8c9f43a00ed2de.png) [**Discord**](https://discord.gg/apexcobblemon)    ![Heart Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/653693cfbfef44fc41cbf349be719da9f33f2f03.png) [**Install Guide**](https://apexcobblemon.com/modpack)    ![Help](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0862cc275b6c3c7b907bc9264945c5b5b08663df.png) [**Wiki**](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com)
